subcodes.first_line: O Karim! After circumambulating the House, the honored 'Abdu'r-Rahím turned his attention toward the Bayán and its truths, and through divine grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا کریم جناب عبدالرحیم بعد از طواف بیت ببانی و محقق آن توجه نمود و از عنایت
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge of self, @martyrs and martyrdom, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
